subcodes.first_line: The mention of Nabíl in your letter hath been noted. Blessed art thou for having mentioned him. We bear witness that he hath attained unto that which was revealed in the Books of God, and We testify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر جناب نبیل در نامه آنجناب بوده طوبى لک بما ذکرته نشهد انه فاز بما نزل فی کتب الله و نشهد
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @personal instructions, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
